backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management, booking form submission (open to all callers), and admin-only retrieval of all submissions, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that AdminPage.tsx must render immediately without any authentication gate, calling useGetAllSubmissions unconditionally on mount.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short summaries describing each component's purpose, styling, and key behaviors for the DJ Fizz website.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the DJ Fizz React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main.tsx entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining root layout with Header/Footer and two routes: HomePage at / and AdminPage at /admin.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying DJ Fizz's portrait photo with neon green glow border and bio copy describing his style and event experience.
frontend/src/components/AddOns.tsx: Premium add-ons section rendering five glass cards for lighting, audio, and projection services with neon green icon accents and a custom packages note.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Eight-field booking inquiry form that submits to the backend via useSubmitForm mutation, handling loading, success, and error states with a reset option to submit another inquiry.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info, social links, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Placeholder gallery section component that renders an empty section element with the id 'gallery'.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop and mobile nav menus, smooth-scroll section links, and an admin route button.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying a banner image with animated neon-green light beam overlays, a headline, subheadline, and CTA buttons for scrolling to booking.
frontend/src/components/MoreThanMusic.ts: Section highlighting DJ Fizz's event-professional qualities across four pillars (timeline management, crowd reading, planner coordination, seamless transitions) displayed as icon cards alongside descriptive copy.
frontend/src/components/SEOSection.tsx: SEO-focused section emphasizing DJ Fizz's service area in Raleigh/Triangle NC, with keyword-rich copy, three feature badges, and a 'Check Availability' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays four DJ service categories (Weddings, Corporate Events, School Dances, Private Parties) as icon cards with descriptions and a 'Learn More' link that scrolls to the booking section.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials section with five hardcoded client reviews displayed in a responsive grid, each showing star ratings, quote text, and event details with a neon-green glass-card style.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all booking submissions (useGetAllSubmissions) and submitting a new booking form (useSubmitForm) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with a dark neon-green theme via CSS variables, and defines custom utility classes for glow effects, glass cards, beam animations, and fade-in transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that fetches and displays all booking submissions as styled cards, showing event details like name, email, phone, venue, guest count, and timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the public-facing home page by rendering all section components in order: Hero, About, Services, AddOns, MoreThanMusic, Gallery, Testimonials, SEOSection, and BookingForm.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with neon green/dark black color palette, custom fonts (Bebas Neue, Inter), neon glow box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing the DJ Fizz website build, including architecture notes, known issues (admin auth blocking, form submission failures), and a versioned list of implemented features.
